old_column.content: * A function that is called when the individual query is started. The function is called with a lifecycle api object containing properties such as `queryFulfilled`, allowing code to be run when a query is started, when it succeeds, and when it fails (i.e. throughout the lifecycle of an individual query/mutation call).
